overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt exploring a medieval coastal fortress at night. The character moves from a cliff overlook through torchlit stone corridors and along cliffside paths, encountering a guard near the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlook with panoramic view of castle town

events.description: character turns left from facing the view and begins walking toward the stone stairs

agents.ego_description: standing on cliff edge observing the distant illuminated castle town, then turning to approach the entrance stairs

entered.detail: rocky outcrop where character stands overlooking the coast
illuminated medieval town with multiple buildings across the water
tall cylindrical tower with lit windows
dark water visible in the distance below the cliff

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a moonlit cliff overlook with a panoramic view of a distant castle town across the water. The character stands on the rocky ledge before turning left toward a stone staircase entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending into castle interior

events.description: enters covered stone staircase from the open cliff
ambient light shifts from cool moonlight to warm orange torchlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the wide stone stairs into the castle structure

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward into the building
rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls
arched stone entrance at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stone stairwell, ascending into the castle interior. The lighting transitions from moonlight to warm torchlight as the stone walls enclose the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden-paneled interior corridor with hanging lanterns

events.description: enters wooden-paneled corridor from stone stairwell

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor toward the distant archway exit

entered.detail: dark wood paneling covering the corridor walls
iron chandelier with warm light suspended from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow interior corridor lined with dark wooden panels and illuminated by hanging lanterns, approaching an archway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone balcony and descending stairs with brazier

events.description: exits corridor onto open stone balcony overlooking the sea
returns to moonlit exterior with mixed torchlight from brazier

agents.ego_description: walking across the balcony and down the exterior stairs toward the lower cliff path

entered.detail: curved stone terrace with parapet overlooking the water
large metal fire bowl burning with bright flames

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor onto a stone balcony, the character passes a burning brazier and descends exterior stairs. The scene opens to the night sky and coastal views with mixed torch and moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside dirt path along castle walls

events.description: encounters guard standing by the wall holding a torch
distant gazebo and tower become clearly visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliffside path, passing a stationary guard, heading toward the lit structures ahead

notable_agents.action: guard standing by the stone wall holding a lit torch

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail along the cliff edge
octagonal wooden pavilion with lit interior
armored guard with helmet and torch

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path carved into the cliffside, passing a guard with a torch who stands by the stone wall. Ahead, a lit gazebo and tower become visible in the distance as the path continues along the fortress perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit cliffside overlook into the torchlit depths of a fortress before emerging back onto a coastal perimeter path. It begins on a rocky ledge overlooking a distant castle town across the water, before turning toward a stone staircase that leads upward. As the character ascends, the open moonlight transitions into the warm, enclosed glow of torchlight and hanging lanterns within narrow stone corridors and dark wooden halls. The scene then opens back up as the camera passes through an archway and a burning brazier onto an exterior balcony, descending stairs under a mixed canopy of night sky and firelight. Finally, the movement shifts to a narrow dirt path carved into the cliffside, passing a torch-bearing guard as a lit gazebo and tower appear in the distance along the fortress walls.
